sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String, nullable_value Nullable(Int8));
SELECT id, toInt8OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL AND nullable_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrNull(value) IS NULL OR nullable_value IS NULL;
SELECT id, value, nullable_value FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL AND (value = '128' OR nullable_value IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, toInt8OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table) AS inner_query WHERE IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, count(*) FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING count(*) > 1;
SELECT id, AVG(toInt8OrNull(value)) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY id) AS average_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, count(*) as total_valid FROM test_table WHERE toInt8OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING total_valid < 2;
